Confidential CACI execution policy verification (WASM demo)

Loads an attestation report, host AMD certificate bundle, UVM endorsement, and relying-party policy, then calls the staged CACI WASM bindings. On success, the verified REPORT_DATA is returned.

Attestation report (binary, 1184 bytes)
AMD certificate bundle (host-amd-cert-base64)
UVM endorsement COSE (base64)
Relying-party policy
